summary: Classification Pipeline (5-stage) Integration Testing Complete - 15/15 backend tests passed, frontend Dashboard and Document Detail pages verified

minor.issue: Some test document IDs from previous iterations return 500 (c3bf1459-e48d-4905-a813-84b02386b9c4) - document may have been removed or renamed
BC API in demo/sandbox mode - 'Could not obtain BC token' is expected behavior

issues: Document preview shows HTTP 404 for documents without physical files on disk (expected behavior for test docs)

critical_code_review_comments: classification_pipeline.py: 5-stage pipeline (PARSE, CLASSIFY, EXTRACT, VALIDATE, ROUTE) correctly implemented with quality gates
PARSE stage correctly uses UPLOAD_DIR/{doc_id} fallback when local_file_path is missing (line 116-119)
CLASSIFY stage correctly merges heuristic+LLM (heuristic for classification, LLM for extraction) with method like 'heuristic:bol_filename+llm'
EXTRACT stage quality gate filters _detected_by metadata fields and requires meaningful_count >= 1 (lines 534-538)
bc_validation_service.py: extraction_quality_gate check correctly rejects zero-data documents (lines 328-340)
Pipeline response includes: pipeline_status, pipeline_stages (dict with status/quality_gate/error/ms per stage), classification_method, meaningful_field_count

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login, Dashboard, Documents, Document Detail pages all render correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: 5-stage classification pipeline verified. Pipeline returns: pipeline_status (passed/failed), pipeline_stages dict with parse/classify/extract/validate/route (each has status, quality_gate, error, ms), classification_method (e.g. 'heuristic:bol_filename+llm' or 'llm:gemini-3-flash-preview'), meaningful_field_count. BC API is in demo mode so validate stage fails with 'Could not obtain BC token' - this is expected. Test doc IDs may change between iterations - use status=Completed filter to find valid docs.

Quality gate passes with real data (vendor, bol_number, etc.)

Works independently of pipeline
